subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the divine cup of reunion! Upon thee be the glory of God, His grace and His successive bounties. The sun at the hour of setting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مدهوش جام خلت الهی علیک بهاء الله و فضله و جوده المتوالی آفتاب دم غروب و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
